data.title: Wire marker removal into ticket-revert.sh when target event is ARCHIVED
data.description: Modify plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-revert.sh to call remove_marker() via python3 inline after writing a REVERT event whose target_event_type is ARCHIVED. Add python3 inline call: python3 -c 'import sys; sys.path.insert(0, sys.argv[1]); from ticket_reducer.marker import remove_marker; remove_marker(sys.argv[2], sys.argv[3])' "" "" "...". Only remove marker when target_event_type == ARCHIVED. No-op for other event types. Marker removal is best-effort (non-blocking on failure). testing_mode: GREEN (T7 already covers behavior).
